body.p: When you’re up for some Spice experience, the last thing you want is to have limited flavor options to choose from. With Online Herbal Incense Store, you can trigger your session with as many as 11 different flavors, from Mr. Nice Guy to Mind Trip and Pure Fire. These are known for their soothing scents and will work for your potpourri experience.

Despite the selected flavor, you’ll get potent K2 Liquid Incense Spray online. Our sprays are not for the faint-hearted and should only be consumed by experienced enthusiasts. If you’re a beginner, you should proceed carefully.
When it comes to the spray bottle volumes, you can pick:

Even a 125-ml spray bottle contains enough liquid Spice for multiple sessions. To help you figure out how much you need, remember that a single A4 sheet can be completely covered with just 25 ml of Spice.

Phone General Inquiries: +1 (717) 744-8960
142 Park City Center, Lancaster, PA 17601, United States
https://www.onlineherbalincense.com/product/k2-liquid-incense/
